narrative:
Muskingum Twp township has 3,286 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
